title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 305.100 - Tampering with airport a misdemeanor
text:
305.100.  Tampering with airport a misdemeanor. — Any person who shall interfere or tamper with any airdrome, flying field or airway, or the lights, markers or other equipment thereof, shall be deemed guilty of a misdemeanor.
(RSMo 1939 § 15114) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 13913
